title: Single-Counterparty Credit Limits for Bank Holding Companies and Foreign Banking Organizations
abstract: The Board is adopting a final rule to amend the compliance dates related to Single-Counterparty Credit Limits for Bank Holding Companies and Foreign Banking Organizations (final SCCL rule). The final rule revises the final SCCL rule to modify the initial compliance dates of January 1, 2020, for a foreign banking organization that has the characteristics of a global systemically important banking organization, and July 1, 2020, for any other foreign banking organization subject to the final SCCL
action: Final rule to extend compliance dates.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Final Rule > 2020-09665
